title: Review: post-audit round 2 fixes across all backends
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — No CVEs, no API lock-in footguns, no hidden invariants. Two deferred-error bugs (GCP empty version, Azure slash) filed. Existing zeroization gaps in serde_json backends (GCP, Doppler, Vault) are already documented and tracked separately.
Confidence: 90% chance of no missed critical bug. Uncertainty driven by: GCP SM and Azure KV are not integration-testable in this environment. Would raise confidence with live service tests against GCP SM and Azure KV.
